sections.paragraph:
m. with suff. פִּלְכֹּו m.-

(1) a circle, circuit, environs (Kreis, Bezirk) i.e. כִּכָּר (Arab. فَلَكَةُ, Chald. פֶּלֶךְ id.) Neh 3:9, seqq. פֶּלֶךְ יְרוּשָׁלַיִם “the region around Jerusalem,” Neh 3:12, 14 , 15 .

(2) the whirl of a woman’s spindle, and here the spindle itself, Pro 31:19. (Arab. فَلَكَةُ id., Talmud. פלד, פלכה, פילכה, whence פַּלֵּךְ to spin).

(3) a round staff, crutch, 2Sa 3:29. LXX. σκυτάλη.
